summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lifecycle Bot Dashboard. All 30 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed - login, registration, dashboard components all working correctly.

minor.issue: demo_user credentials (demo_user/demo123) don't work - user exists but password mismatch. Tests use dynamically created users instead.

action_items: Consider resetting demo_user password to 'demo123' if demo credentials are needed for documentation/testing

All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from responses
test_credentials: Tests create unique users dynamically (e.g., TEST_user_xxx, auth_user_xxx)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create test data: trades, positions, watchlist tokens, activity logs, treasury snapshots
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working. Dashboard displays: stats cards, treasury chart, trade history, activity feed, watchlist, positions table. Auth flow (register/login/logout) working. Demo user password may need reset if specific credentials required.
